name: Tiramisu--Italian Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Mascarpone cheese; or 1 1/2 pounds Cream cheese mixed with
1/2 cup Heavy cream and 1/4 cup Sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread Ladyfingers on a large baking sheet. In a small bowl, combine the coffee and brandy. Sprinkle the Ladyfingers with this mixture, then set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar with an electric mixer until thick and lemon-colored, about 4 to 5 minutes. Add Mascarpone (or cream cheese mixture) and blend on low speed until combined.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form, about 2 to 3 minutes. Using a spatula, gently fold the whites into the Mascarpone mixture.
4. Line the bottom of an 8-cup soufflé dish with half of the Ladyfingers. Spread half of the Mascarpone mixture on the Ladyfingers and sprinkle with cocoa powder. Repeat layers, ending with cocoa powder.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours. To serve, spoon onto a serving plate.
